[[20 BBY/Legends|20]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="Date">According to the [[The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors|''The History of the Mandalorians'']], the '''mission to Norval II''' was the final mission undertaken by the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes the Protectors to have fought in the war in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], and the Clone Wars to have ended in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Therefore, the mission must have occurred between 20 and 19 BBY.</ref>

{{Quote|At any rate, the war was finally won -- but at a terrible cost. Of the two hundred an' twelve Protectors that went inta battle, only ''three'' survived.|[[Fenn Shysa]]|<ref name="SW68" />}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] undertook a '''mission to Norval II''', with the objective of capturing [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. However, the operation was a Republic trap, and the Protectors were ambushed and all but wiped out.

==The mission==
Late in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="GAW" /> [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] leader<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] ordered the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]], led by rogue [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] and [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Spar|Alpha-Ø2]], to capture [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] on [[Norval II]]. Howevever, the mission was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] ambush.<ref name="HOTM" /> In his identity as the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] Palpatine,<ref name="ROTS" /> Sidious had simultaneously sent the [[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]] to Norval II. The Nova Guard slaughtered the [[Mandalorian Supercommando|Supercommandos]] of the Mandalorian Protectors, with [[Fenn Shysa]], [[Tobbi Dala]], and Alpha-Ø2 as the only survivors,<ref name="GAW" /> and the majority of their [[BL-series Battle Legionnaire]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were destroyed.<ref name="HOTM" />

==Aftermath==
The mission would be the Mandalorian Protectors' last: after the Clone Wars, the shell-shocked Alpha-Ø2 left for the [[Extrictarium Nebula/Legends|Extrictarium Nebula]], where he succumbed to [[clone madness]], leaving Dala and Shysa to rebuild the Protectors on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-[[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].<ref name="HOTM" />
